title: rosa tomentosa subsp. vestita
intro: Rosa tomentosa subsp. vestita, also known as the hairy rose or woolly rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rosa tomentosa subsp. vestita include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Rosa tomentosa subsp. vestita include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
